channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Could the US deploy troops to Iran, and how could that play out?
item.description: Experts say Iran’s vast, mountainous terrain would make invasion difficult but a small, precise mission is possible.

item.title: The Israel-Hezbollah ceasefire was built to fail
item.description: Israeli attacks never stopped, and the mechanism meant to police violations had no power to stop them.

item.title: Sudan’s devastating war rages on as regional rivalries deepen
item.description: Yet the fallout from the Iran war could push Gulf rivals to cooperate, opening space for diplomacy on Sudan.

item.title: What happened in Ukraine missile attack in Russia’s Bryansk?
item.description: A Ukrainian missile attack on Russia’s Bryansk killed 6 civilians and injured 37 others, according to local officials.

item.title: Iran cannot participate in the FIFA World Cup, sports minister says
item.description: Iran says 'under no circumstances' will it participate following the US-Israeli attacks that killed its supreme leader.

item.title: Funeral held for top Iranian commanders killed in US-Israeli strikes
item.description: Thousands of people gathered in Tehran to mourn top Iranian military officials killed by US-Israeli strikes.

item.title: Why Iraq was attacked from all sides amid US-Israel war on Iran
item.description: Iraq has seen attacks from both sides of the conflict: Iran and its proxies on the one side and the US on the other.

item.title: Turkish president urges end to Iran war
item.description: Turkiye’s president has urged a return to the negotiating table before the Iran war “sets the entire region on fire.”

item.title: Could Iran be using China’s highly accurate BeiDou navigation system?
item.description: Intelligence experts have suggested China has made its satellite navigation system available to Iran.

item.title: Spain removes ambassador from Israel in protest to Iran war, Gaza genocide
item.description: Madrid recalls ambassador amid rising diplomatic tensions and criticism of US-Israeli actions in Iran.
